star_1.text: SO MANY ADS i play this game for just 1 minute and 100 ads

Fun game, but if you pay to remove the ads there are still loads of ads depending on which buttons you press inside the game (which isn't at all obvious). Those ads are very intrusive, we basically close and reopen the app as that's less painful. Very frustrating for the kids, waste of money and basically a bit of a con as I paid to remove the ads.

REMOVE ADS. The ads are so annoying, and they can pop up anywhere, and it's repetitive as hell. Even the no ads don't work, considering it says, "No ads." I know ads is a way to get money, but you can buy no ads, but it just makes it worse! ABSOLUTELY GARBAGE, UNINSTALLED FOREVER.

Game made exclusively to monetize ads, extremely basic graphics and mindless action, just to lure you in so you can see one ad between every single level, also at the emd of the game, game says i made 63 points multiplied by 3.3 = 123 (?????) just to show in the post round score comparison to buildings only 25. Terrible, I do not recommend.

This is a super fun game but the ads are inappropriate... Not "E" for everyone at all! How can the game be rated "E" but the ads my kid has to sit thru are "T" for Teen or above? I had to delete the game because the ads are so intrusive & inappropriate. One had the playable ad where she's instructed to unzip a woman's shirt. Huh??? No thanks. Delete. I hope the developers will consider addressing this issue. I wouldn't recommend this to other parents.

This game sucks because it just freezes like on level 5 and it is just horrible and there's like a ad every single time after a level it's just horrible but I think you should get it maybe because it's just it's fun the first two levels are so easy they're so fun but the other levels are hard because they're just freeze and you have to try to get yourself up above everything and it's just hard

Too many ads, and the game expects you to always grab at least 5/10 wrong neck pieces and if you don't then 18.7*107=807 so that you don't progress too fast. Then what's the point of the multipliers, and why make the end height show in meters or foot or whatever. Too confusing.

Gameplay gets repetitive over time becoming boring and boring, a unnecessary amount of ads, and little to no skins. You can tell that the game developer lacked creativity on this project and only looked into the profit they would get from this game. Don't install this game.

star_3.text: it works. But their is a feeling that you are not in control, the game is. maybe you get that pattern that allows maximum success, but oops, the end gate multiplier is lower then the one time it was higher but the pattern wasn't on your side the obstacles RNG just right to be undodgeable. Eventually, you feel like the game decides you succeed, not you. sucks all the fun out really fast. the pet is pointless and their are often color changing gates that don't need to be there.

At first I thought that this game was above average, because in itself it was made well. But then I realized that the gameplay quickly becomes repetetive and boring, and, there is probably no way to ever actually reach that boyfriend from the beginning of the game. I searched the game up on YouTube, and seemingly, no one has gone past the death star that requires like 30,000 neck rings...

The game was fun. But after a week, I got tired from playing (but I didn't uninstalled it). Don't get me wrong, the app WAS fun and entertaining, there wasn't enough obstacles and unlockable characters in the game. I've already had 200k diamonds/gems, but it is now useless because I already unlocked all 6 characters. Other than that, can you please add a "Skip" button to the part where the level ends? It is so frustrating to see and wait for the character to finish running.

Decent game. Pretty fun if you like this style of game, but it lags sometimes (and you mess up because of it) and there are a lot of ads. After a level you can watch an ad for more gems but even if you don't you have to watch one anyway. There aren't many cosmetics either. The obstacles are pretty generic and the levels aren't very long. Overall I think if you're a fan of this kind of game and don't mind a little lag, repetitive levels, and you're fine with a lot of ads, go for it.

Fun game, only thing i don't like about it is that, ill unlock an obstacle, click next and theres an add. Then i finish watching the add and it kicks me outof the game then i have to restart the level, and this happens after EVERY add. Overall good game 3/5 ⭐
